name: Amazon Nova Lite
note: Low-cost multimodal (text/image/video-in) Nova tier tuned for speed; launched alongside Micro and Pro at re:Invent 2024.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Dec 3, 2024 re:Invent launch (Amazon Press Center, TechCrunch, Businesswire all corroborate). Confirmed 300K context, multimodal text/image/video (AWS Nova docs), 200-language support (AWS re:Post + Nova language docs), $0.06/$0.24 per M pricing (matches $0.00006/$0.00024 per 1K on AWS Nova pricing page). All 8 benchmark rows (MMLU 80.5, GPQA 42, MATH 73.3, HumanEval 85.4, GSM8K 94.5, BBH 82.4, IFEval 89.7, DROP 80.2) confirmed to literally appear on deepranking.ai/llm-models/nova-lite. Minor note: deepranking.ai's own page lists a Nov 19, 2024 date for Nova Lite, but all official Amazon sources confirm Dec 3, 2024 — kept the Amazon-sourced date.
